example: The real construction site is busy with workers and machines.
Construction workers build new buildings and roads.
A community is a group of people who live in the same city or neighborhood.
zh: 社區，一群住在同一城市或鄰里的人民
ja: コミュニティ、同じ街や近所に住む人々の集まり

example: An excavator digs wide ditches for basements.
It digs narrow trenches for water pipes.
Mr. Moore used to be a carpenter who built things with wood.
He follows plans that an architect created.
They may start work as apprentices to learn on the job.
Workers wear hard hats to protect their heads.
They wear orange safety vests so others can see them easily.
A concrete mixer beeps as it backs up.
ja: コンクリートミキサー車

example: Wet concrete flows through a long pipe to the ground.
Masons build the walls with bricks.
Some bricks break but they will be recycled.
Your school is a green school, which means it is earth friendly.
Solar panels on the roof provide energy from the sun.
Windows and skylights lead in sunlight to save energy.
